name: Mycelium Capture
description: Record a voice note, send it to Mycelium for transcription + routing, and show the result as a notification.
note: iOS Shortcuts use a proprietary binary .shortcut format. This JSON describes the steps a human recreates in the Shortcuts app. The setup page at /fitness/shortcut-setup has screenshots and the API secret.

steps.note: Use Record Audio rather than Dictate Text — Whisper does its own transcription and handles long-form better.
Replace {{API_SECRET}} with the secret shown on /fitness/shortcut-setup. The header name is case-insensitive.
